mapper.sql: select id, user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_new_performance, team_new_performance, total_line_performance, max_line_performance, previous_community_performance, current_community_performance, community_new_performance, settle_status, batch_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from t_stake_hosting_weekly_community_performance
mapper.insert: insert into t_stake_hosting_weekly_community_performance ( user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_new_performance, team_new_performance, total_line_performance, max_line_performance, previous_community_performance, current_community_performance, community_new_performance, settle_status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{weekStartTime}, #{weekEndTime}, #{selfAmount}, #{teamAmount}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), week_end_time = values(week_end_time), self_new_performance = values(self_new_performance), team_new_performance = values(team_new_performance), update_time = now()
